ecb.description: UNLAWFULLY CONTINUED WORK WHILE ON NOTICE OF A STOP WORK ORDER. (SUSPENDED SCAFFOLD RELOCATED TO EXPOSURE #4 FROM EXPOSURE #1) REM: COMPLY WITH STOP WORK ORDER.
LICENSED RIGGER FAILED TO ENSURE SCAFFOLD WORKER MET MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS. (WORKER ON TWO PT SUSPENDED SCAFFOLD W/NO CERTIFICATE OF FITNESS). REMEDY: COMPLY W/CODE.
FAILED TO NOTIFY DEPT/OBTAIN PERMIT PRIOR TO USE/INST OF C-HOOKS IN CONNECTION W/SUSPENDED SCAFFOLD. EXPIRED C-HOOK NOTIFICATION. REMEDY: NOTIFY THE DEPT.
INADEQUATE SAFETY MEASURES. OPERATION OF HOISTING EQUIPMENT IN UNSAFE MANNER. (RAILS MISSING ON SUSPENDED SCAFFOLD PLATFORM). REMEDY: DISCONTINUE USE.

WORKING W/O A PLUMBING PERMIT IN APT 614: UPON INSPECTION AT ABOVE LOCATION SUBJECT WAS PERFORMING UNLICENSED PLUMBING WORK. HE WAS WORKING ON THE RADIATOR IN APT 614. HE INSTALLED NEW FITTING W/MIXTURE OF
